description_long: This armchair features a broad, rounded backrest and thick, padded armrests, all upholstered in a textured gray fabric. The seat is deep and plush, with a subtle tufted detail at the center, suggesting comfort and support. The armrests are wide and curve smoothly from the backrest to the front, creating an inviting and enveloping silhouette. The chair's base is fully upholstered, with no visible legs, giving it a solid and grounded appearance. The upholstery has a heathered, woven texture that adds visual interest and a soft, tactile quality. Overall, the design is modern and robust, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A modern, fully upholstered gray armchair with rounded backrest, wide padded armrests, and a deep, tufted seat. The chair has a solid base with no visible legs and a textured fabric finish.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, rounded backrest, thick armrests, and deep, tufted seat.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the continuous curve of the armrest and the full, upholstered base.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the rounded, seamless backrest and the solid, fabric-covered back.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, emphasizing the armrest's curve and the chair's substantial profile.
attribute_backrest_style: tall, rounded, fully upholstered with a smooth surface
attribute_leg_type: no visible legs, fully upholstered base
